svg.text: Trained mechatronics technician with additional background in IT systems
integration. After working in manufacturing and construction, I shifted
Since October 2025, studying full-time at 42 Heilbronn — a project-based
engineering school without lectures. Currently transitioning into Python.
Focused on building a strong technical foundation. Open to where that
leads — the priority is writing good code and understanding how systems work from the ground up.
